ሰላም.definitionEn: a greeting; a state of calm and tranquility

እናት.definitionEn: a woman who has given birth to a child; the mother of a family

አባት.definitionEn: a man who has fathered a child; the father of a family
አባት.exampleEn: My father goes to work early in the morning.

ወንድም.definitionEn: a male child of the same parents
ወንድም.exampleEn: My brother is older than me.

እህት.definitionEn: a female child of the same parents

ልጅ.definitionEn: a young person; a parent's offspring
ልጅ.exampleEn: The child plays in the field.

አምስት.exampleEn: There are five fingers on one hand.

ላም.definitionEn: a domestic animal that gives milk

ድመት.definitionEn: a small animal kept at home

ፈረስ.definitionEn: a strong animal used for riding

ዶሮ.definitionEn: a domestic bird that lays eggs

levels.title: Food & buna

ውሃ.meaningAm: ለመጠጥና ለመታጠብ የሚያገለግል ጥርት ያለ ፈሳሽ
ውሃ.definitionEn: a clear liquid used for drinking and washing
ውሃ.exampleEn: Please give me a glass of water.

ዳቦ.exampleEn: I ate bread in the morning.

levels.goal: I can name foods and drinks

ወተት.definitionEn: a white drink that comes from cattle
ወተት.exampleEn: I drink milk in the morning.

እንጀራ.definitionEn: a traditional Ethiopian food made from teff

levels.title: Colors & body
levels.goal: I can name colors and body parts

ራስ.definitionEn: the upper part of the body, where the brain is

እጅ.definitionEn: the body part we use to hold and work

እግር.definitionEn: the body part we use to walk
እግር.exampleEn: I go to school on foot.

ዓይን.definitionEn: the body part used for seeing

ጆሮ.definitionEn: the body part used for hearing

መኪና.exampleEn: My father bought a new car.

ምግብ.definitionEn: something prepared to eat that nourishes the body

ግብ.definitionEn: an aim one wants to reach

ፍቅር.meaningAm: ለሰው ወይም ለነገር የሚሰማ ጥልቅ የመውደድ ስሜት
ፍቅር.definitionEn: a deep feeling of affection for a person or thing
ፍቅር.exampleEn: A mother's love has no limit.

መጽሐፍ.definitionEn: a collection of writing meant for reading

ትምህርት.definitionEn: the process of gaining knowledge and skills
ትምህርት.exampleEn: Education is the light of life.

ስም.definitionEn: the word by which a person or thing is called

ፀሐይ.definitionEn: the body in the sky that gives light and heat
ፀሐይ.exampleEn: The sun rises in the morning.

አበባ.definitionEn: the colorful, fragrant part of a plant
አበባ.exampleEn: The flower has a pleasant smell.

ጓደኛ.definitionEn: a person one spends time with and is fond of

ቀን.definitionEn: the time from dawn to evening

አፍ.definitionEn: the part of the face used for eating and speaking

ልብ.meaningAm: ደም የሚያመነጭ የሰውነት አካል፤ የስሜት ማዕከል
ልብ.definitionEn: the organ that pumps blood; the center of emotion

ጥርስ.meaningAm: ምግብ ለማኘክ የሚያገለግል በአፍ ውስጥ ያለ
ጥርስ.definitionEn: the part in the mouth used to chew food

ሴት.definitionEn: a person of the female sex

ወንድ.definitionEn: a person of the male sex

ሻይ.definitionEn: a warm drink brewed from leaves

ጨው.definitionEn: a white seasoning that flavors food

ስኳር.definitionEn: what makes food and drink sweet

ስጋ.definitionEn: a food that comes from animals

እንቁላል.definitionEn: an oval food that comes from a hen
እንቁላል.exampleEn: I ate an egg in the morning.

አሳ.definitionEn: an animal that lives in water
አሳ.exampleEn: The fish swims in the river.

ሰማይ.definitionEn: the wide expanse above the earth

ኮከብ.definitionEn: a body that shines in the sky at night

ዛፍ.definitionEn: a large plant with branches and leaves

ባህር.definitionEn: a large body of salt water

ዝናብ.definitionEn: water that falls from the clouds

ሌሊት.meaningAm: ከምሽት እስከ ንጋት ያለው ጨለማ ጊዜ
ሌሊት.definitionEn: the dark time from evening to dawn

መብላት.definitionEn: to take food into the body

መጠጣት.exampleEn: Drinking water is good for your health.

ገበያ.definitionEn: a place where goods are bought and sold
ገበያ.exampleEn: I went to the market and bought vegetables.

መንገድ.definitionEn: a passage for going from place to place

ከተማ.definitionEn: a large place where many people live
ከተማ.exampleEn: Addis Ababa is a big city.

አገር.definitionEn: a territory where a people lives

ሱቅ.definitionEn: a small store where goods are sold
ሱቅ.exampleEn: I bought bread from the shop.

ባቡር.definitionEn: a long vehicle that travels on rails

ሱሪ.definitionEn: a garment worn below the waist

ኮፍያ.definitionEn: a covering worn on the head
ኮፍያ.exampleEn: I wear a hat when it's sunny.

ዶክተር.definitionEn: a professional who treats the sick

ነጋዴ.definitionEn: a person who buys and sells goods

ማን.definitionEn: a word used to ask about a person

ምን.definitionEn: a word used to ask about a thing

የት.definitionEn: a word used to ask about a place

መቼ.definitionEn: a word used to ask about time

ለምን.definitionEn: a word used to ask about a reason

እንዴት.definitionEn: a word used to ask about manner

መሄድ.definitionEn: to move from one place to another

ማንበብ.definitionEn: to look at and understand what is written

መጻፍ.definitionEn: to put down letters with a pen
መጻፍ.exampleEn: He began to write a letter.

ጠረጴዛ.meaningAm: ዕቃ የሚቀመጥበት ባለ እግር የቤት ዕቃ
ጠረጴዛ.definitionEn: a legged piece of furniture for placing things on
ጠረጴዛ.exampleEn: The book is on the table.

በር.definitionEn: the entrance and exit of a house

ወንበር.definitionEn: a piece of furniture used for sitting

አልጋ.definitionEn: a piece of furniture used for sleeping
አልጋ.exampleEn: The child slept on the bed.

ደስታ.exampleEn: Happiness can be read on her face.

መስማት.definitionEn: to receive sound with the ears

መናገር.definitionEn: to express a thought in words
መናገር.exampleEn: He is afraid to speak in public.

ሩዝ.definitionEn: a grain eaten after being boiled in water

ቅቤ.exampleEn: He spread butter on the bread.

ላይ.exampleEn: The item is on the shelf.

ውስጥ.exampleEn: The dog is inside the house.

ወንዝ.definitionEn: a large flowing channel of water

ደን.exampleEn: There are animals in the forest.

በረዶ.exampleEn: There is snow on the mountain.

እባክህ.definitionEn: a word said to express politeness

ፊት.definitionEn: the front part of the head

ሆድ.definitionEn: the body part where food is digested

አህያ.definitionEn: an animal used to carry goods

በሬ.definitionEn: a male ox used for farming

እባብ.exampleEn: The snake hid in the grass.

ጦጣ.definitionEn: an animal that lives in trees

ደመና.definitionEn: water vapor seen in the sky

ጨረቃ.definitionEn: the body seen in the sky at night

መብረቅ.definitionEn: light that flashes from the clouds

ጉም.definitionEn: cloud that settles near the ground

ብር.definitionEn: money used for buying (the Ethiopian birr)

ኳስ.definitionEn: a round object used for playing
ኳስ.exampleEn: The children play with a ball.

ቁልፍ.definitionEn: what is used to open a door

መነሳት.definitionEn: to wake from sleep; to rise

መታጠብ.definitionEn: to clean the body with water
መታጠብ.exampleEn: Washing in the morning is refreshing.

መግባት.exampleEn: He wants to enter the room.

መውጣት.exampleEn: It's time to leave the house.

መስጠት.definitionEn: to hand over to another person

መውሰድ.exampleEn: Don't forget to take an umbrella.

መሸጥ.exampleEn: The merchant began to sell goods.

ማር.definitionEn: a sweet liquid that comes from bees

ሽንኩርት.exampleEn: I cried while cutting the onion.

ዘይት.exampleEn: She fried the food in oil.

አጎት.exampleEn: My uncle came from far away.

ሚስት.definitionEn: a married woman; a husband's spouse

መድሃኒት.definitionEn: what is taken to treat illness

ደም.definitionEn: the red liquid that circulates in the body

ደብተር.definitionEn: a collection of paper for writing

ጥያቄ.definitionEn: a statement that seeks an answer

ዛሬ.definitionEn: the day we are in now

ሳምንት.exampleEn: There are seven days in a week.

ቆሻሻ.exampleEn: Don't reach in with a dirty hand.

ጥም.exampleEn: I felt thirsty in the heat.

ወጥ.definitionEn: a dish made from meat or vegetables

ሣር.definitionEn: a green plant that grows on the ground

ቅጠል.definitionEn: the green part of a plant

ዘር.definitionEn: what a new plant grows from

ስር.definitionEn: the underground part of a plant

ወለል.definitionEn: the lower surface of a house that is walked on

ግድግዳ.definitionEn: the upright part that encloses a house
ግድግዳ.exampleEn: He hung a picture on the wall.

ጣሪያ.definitionEn: the upper covering of a house

ማወቅ.definitionEn: to have an understanding of something

ሰኞ.definitionEn: the first working day of the week
ሰኞ.exampleEn: On Monday I go to work.

ማክሰኞ.exampleEn: There is an exam on Tuesday.

ረቡዕ.definitionEn: the middle day of the week

ሐሙስ.exampleEn: On Thursday I go to the market.

ቅዳሜ.definitionEn: a day at the end of the week

እሁድ.definitionEn: the rest day of the week

ወር.definitionEn: a period of about thirty days
ወር.exampleEn: There are twelve months in a year.

መሮጥ.exampleEn: The boy ran in the field.

መራመድ.exampleEn: I walk a lot every day.

መክፈት.definitionEn: to unclose something that is shut

መዝጋት.definitionEn: to shut something that is open

መርዳት.definitionEn: to give support to another person
መርዳት.exampleEn: I help my mother with work.

መጫወት.definitionEn: to take part in a game

መጠየቅ.exampleEn: I asked the teacher a question.

አውቶቡስ.meaningAm: ብዙ ሰው የሚጭን ትልቅ የሕዝብ ማመላለሻ
አውቶቡስ.definitionEn: a large public vehicle that carries many people

ታክሲ.definitionEn: a car that carries people for a fee

አውሮፕላን.definitionEn: a vehicle that flies in the air
አውሮፕላን.exampleEn: The airplane flew into the sky.

ብስክሌት.definitionEn: a two-wheeled vehicle driven by the feet

ጀልባ.definitionEn: a craft that floats on water
ጀልባ.exampleEn: The boat floats on the river.

ጣቢያ.definitionEn: a place where trains or buses stop
ጣቢያ.exampleEn: I wait for the train at the station.

ሆቴል.definitionEn: a place for staying overnight and eating

ባንክ.definitionEn: an institution where money is kept and borrowed
ባንክ.exampleEn: I went to the bank to deposit money.

ሆስፒታል.definitionEn: a place where the sick are treated
ሆስፒታል.exampleEn: They took the patient to the hospital.

ቢሮ.exampleEn: My office is on the second floor.

ድልድይ.definitionEn: a structure built to cross a river or road
